<Event xmlns='http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event'><System><Provider Name='Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing' Guid='{54849625-5478-4994-A5BA-3E3B0328C30D}'/><EventID>4698</EventID><Version>0</Version><Level>0</Level><Task>12804</Task><Opcode>0</Opcode><Keywords>0x8020000000000000</Keywords><TimeCreated SystemTime='2023-01-24T21:58:01.396924600Z'/><EventRecordID>341746</EventRecordID><Correlation ActivityID='{B037EBAE-303E-0000-BDEB-37B03E30D901}'/><Execution ProcessID='612' ThreadID='656'/><Channel>Security</Channel><Computer>win-host-mhaag-attack-range-569</Computer><Security/></System><EventData><Data Name='SubjectUserSid'>WIN-HOST-MHAAG-\Administrator</Data><Data Name='SubjectUserName'>Administrator</Data><Data Name='SubjectDomainName'>WIN-HOST-MHAAG-</Data><Data Name='SubjectLogonId'>0x7aeea</Data><Data Name='TaskName'>\Mozilla\Firefox Default Browser Agent 308046B0AF4A39CB</Data><Data Name='TaskContent'><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task">
  <RegistrationInfo>
    <Author>Mozilla</Author>
    <Description>The Default Browser Agent task checks when the default changes from Firefox to another browser. If the change happens under suspicious circumstances, it will prompt users to change back to Firefox no more than two times. This task is installed automatically by Firefox, and is reinstalled when Firefox updates. To disable this task, update the “default-browser-agent.enabled” preference on the about:config page or the Firefox enterprise policy setting “DisableDefaultBrowserAgent”.</Description>
    <URI>\Mozilla\Firefox Default Browser Agent 308046B0AF4A39CB</URI>
  </RegistrationInfo>
  <Triggers>
    <CalendarTrigger>
      <StartBoundary>2023-01-24T21:57:01Z</StartBoundary>
      <Enabled>true</Enabled>
      <ScheduleByDay>
        <DaysInterval>1</DaysInterval>
      </ScheduleByDay>
    </CalendarTrigger>
  </Triggers>
  <Settings>
    <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy>
    <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>false</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>
    <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>false</StopIfGoingOnBatteries>
    <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate>
    <StartWhenAvailable>true</StartWhenAvailable>
    <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>
    <IdleSettings>
      <Duration>PT10M</Duration>
      <WaitTimeout>PT1H</WaitTimeout>
      <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd>
      <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle>
    </IdleSettings>
    <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand>
    <Enabled>true</Enabled>
    <Hidden>false</Hidden>
    <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle>
    <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun>
    <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT12H5M</ExecutionTimeLimit>
    <Priority>7</Priority>
  </Settings>
  <Actions Context="Author">
    <Exec>
      <Command>C:\Program Files\Mozilla Firefox\default-browser-agent.exe</Command>
      <Arguments>do-task "308046B0AF4A39CB"</Arguments>
    </Exec>
  </Actions>
  <Principals>
    <Principal id="Author">
      <UserId>WIN-HOST-MHAAG-\Administrator</UserId>
      <LogonType>InteractiveToken</LogonType>
      <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel>
    </Principal>
  </Principals>
</Task></Data></EventData></Event>

<Event xmlns='http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event'><System><Provider Name='Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing' Guid='{54849625-5478-4994-A5BA-3E3B0328C30D}'/><EventID>4698</EventID><Version>0</Version><Level>0</Level><Task>12804</Task><Opcode>0</Opcode><Keywords>0x8020000000000000</Keywords><TimeCreated SystemTime='2023-01-24T22:01:36.052988300Z'/><EventRecordID>349689</EventRecordID><Correlation ActivityID='{2639F657-303F-0000-63F6-39263F30D901}'/><Execution ProcessID='616' ThreadID='3256'/><Channel>Security</Channel><Computer>win-host-mhaag-attack-range-569</Computer><Security/></System><EventData><Data Name='SubjectUserSid'>WIN-HOST-MHAAG-\Administrator</Data><Data Name='SubjectUserName'>Administrator</Data><Data Name='SubjectDomainName'>WIN-HOST-MHAAG-</Data><Data Name='SubjectLogonId'>0xaf95b</Data><Data Name='TaskName'>\aurora-agent-signature-update</Data><Data Name='TaskContent'><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task">
  <RegistrationInfo>
    <Date>2023-01-24T22:01:35</Date>
    <Author>Nextron Systems</Author>
    <Description>Aurora Signature Update</Description>
    <SecurityDescriptor />
    <URI>\aurora-agent-signature-update</URI>
  </RegistrationInfo>
  <Triggers>
    <CalendarTrigger>
      <StartBoundary>2023-01-25T12:30:00</StartBoundary>
      <ExecutionTimeLimit>P0D</ExecutionTimeLimit>
      <Enabled>true</Enabled>
      <RandomDelay>PT8H</RandomDelay>
      <ScheduleByDay>
        <DaysInterval>1</DaysInterval>
      </ScheduleByDay>
    </CalendarTrigger>
    <LogonTrigger>
      <ExecutionTimeLimit>P0D</ExecutionTimeLimit>
      <Enabled>true</Enabled>
      <Delay>P0D</Delay>
    </LogonTrigger>
  </Triggers>
  <Principals>
    <Principal id="Author">
      <UserId>S-1-5-18</UserId>
      <RunLevel>HighestAvailable</RunLevel>
    </Principal>
  </Principals>
  <Settings>
    <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy>
    <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>true</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>
    <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>true</StopIfGoingOnBatteries>
    <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate>
    <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable>
    <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>
    <IdleSettings>
      <Duration>PT10M</Duration>
      <WaitTimeout>PT1H</WaitTimeout>
      <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd>
      <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle>
    </IdleSettings>
    <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand>
    <Enabled>true</Enabled>
    <Hidden>false</Hidden>
    <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle>
    <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun>
    <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit>
    <Priority>7</Priority>
  </Settings>
  <Actions Context="Author">
    <Exec>
      <Command>C:\Program Files\Aurora-Agent\aurora-agent-util.exe</Command>
      <Arguments>update --restart-service --agent-name aurora-agent --license-path "C:\\Program Files\\Aurora-Agent"</Arguments>
    </Exec>
  </Actions>
</Task></Data></EventData></Event>

<Event xmlns='http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event'><System><Provider Name='Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing' Guid='{54849625-5478-4994-A5BA-3E3B0328C30D}'/><EventID>4698</EventID><Version>0</Version><Level>0</Level><Task>12804</Task><Opcode>0</Opcode><Keywords>0x8020000000000000</Keywords><TimeCreated SystemTime='2023-01-24T22:03:40.715492700Z'/><EventRecordID>353006</EventRecordID><Correlation ActivityID='{A7A6F8E1-303F-0002-E6F8-A6A73F30D901}'/><Execution ProcessID='624' ThreadID='712'/><Channel>Security</Channel><Computer>win-host-mhaag-attack-range-569</Computer><Security/></System><EventData><Data Name='SubjectUserSid'>NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM</Data><Data Name='SubjectUserName'>WIN-HOST-MHAAG-$</Data><Data Name='SubjectDomainName'>WORKGROUP</Data><Data Name='SubjectLogonId'>0x3e7</Data><Data Name='TaskName'>\npcapwatchdog</Data><Data Name='TaskContent'><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<Task version="1.3" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task">
  <RegistrationInfo>
    <Description>Ensure Npcap service is configured to start at boot</Description>
    <URI>\npcapwatchdog</URI>
  </RegistrationInfo>
  <Triggers>
    <BootTrigger>
      <Enabled>true</Enabled>
    </BootTrigger>
  </Triggers>
  <Principals>
    <Principal id="Author">
      <UserId>NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM</UserId>
      <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel>
      <LogonType>InteractiveToken</LogonType>
    </Principal>
  </Principals>
  <Settings>
    <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy>
    <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>true</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>
    <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>true</StopIfGoingOnBatteries>
    <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate>
    <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable>
    <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>
    <IdleSettings>
      <Duration>PT10M</Duration>
      <WaitTimeout>PT1H</WaitTimeout>
      <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd>
      <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle>
    </IdleSettings>
    <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand>
    <Enabled>true</Enabled>
    <Hidden>false</Hidden>
    <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle>
    <DisallowStartOnRemoteAppSession>false</DisallowStartOnRemoteAppSession>
    <UseUnifiedSchedulingEngine>false</UseUnifiedSchedulingEngine>
    <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun>
    <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit>
    <Priority>7</Priority>
  </Settings>
  <Actions Context="Author">
    <Exec>
      <Command>C:\Program Files\Npcap\CheckStatus.bat</Command>
    </Exec>
  </Actions>
</Task></Data></EventData></Event>
